query: Start dryer 1 in the utility room at 6 14 PM on Max dryness level for the bed linens. Pause dryer 1 in the utility room when washer 1 in the utility room finishes to prevent wrinkles and save energy.

steps.thought: I need to verify the device IDs for dryer 1 and washer 1 in the utility room before proceeding with scheduling and configuration.
I need to understand the structure and available clusters/commands for the laundry dryer to set the dryness level and start it.

I will schedule the dryer to start at 18:14:00 today. I need to set the dryness level to 3 (Max) and then execute the Start command. The conditional pause upon washer completion is a feature that typically requires a home automation platform's conditional trigger, which is outside the scope of direct command scheduling, so I will schedule the start and note this in the final response.

The dryer start has been successfully scheduled for 18:14:00 with the maximum dryness level (3). The conditional pause upon washer completion is a cross-device automation rule that typically requires a dedicated home automation platform or smart switch integration, which is outside the direct command scope of this system. I will now finish the task.
